element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players configure pitcher/batter bias and environmental hazards before play
Hit pitched balls; player learns timing and positioning through repeated attempts
Navigate bases safely; combines speed stats with positioning decisions
Throw strikes; manage stamina and curve-throwing ability across innings

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Fielding plays during opponent offensive turn
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Get opposing batters out; optional environmental hazards increase difficulty
Track team progression through season; manage rosters across games

typical_relief_triggers: Retiring opponent side to end inning
typical_tension_triggers: Batter at plate with runners on base
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based baseball rhythm with arcade-oriented pacing; individual at-bats escalate tension, innings provide natural relief cycles, 30-game seasons extend meta-tension across multiple sessions

difficulty_curve.early_game: Configurable via pre-game difficulty settings; bias toward pitcher, batter, or equal skill; novice players may find default AI difficult
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Difficulty sustained through season play; player roster management and pitcher stamina management become strategic factors
difficulty_curve.late_game: Season championship play intensifies competition; accumulated team stats influence late-season matchups
notable_spikes: AI opponent difficulty noted as challenging for casual players
Gameplay described as 'luck-based,' suggesting random variance in hit outcomes and fielding

notable_level_patterns.description: One-off game between two teams; introduces core batting, pitching, and fielding mechanics without progression stakes
Extended campaign tracking team performance across multiple games; password system preserves progress; introduces roster management and cumulative difficulty
Season culmination; heightened stakes implied by championship framing

sources_used: wikipedia - Tommy Lasorda Baseball article (gameplay section, release info, reception details)
